fields.label: Week Start
fields.description: Start date of the week this report covers. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The Monday that starts the week this report covers.

fields.label: Week End
fields.description: End date of the week this report covers. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The Sunday that ends the week this report covers.

fields.label: Top Themes
fields.description: Gemini-synthesized themes from Penny interaction logs for the week. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Key themes from learner conversations this week. Generated automatically by Penny.

fields.label: Support Flags
fields.description: Learners flagged this week by support need: Momentum / Clarity / Confidence. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Learners who may need extra support this week. Generated automatically by Penny.

fields.label: Suggested Actions
fields.description: Penny recommended actions for Angela or coaches for the coming week. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Recommended actions for coaches and Angela this week. Generated automatically by Penny.

fields.label: Trail Breakdown
fields.description: Per-trail summary of learner activity for the week. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Activity summary broken down by trail. Generated automatically by Penny.

fields.label: Generated At
fields.description: Date and time this weekly report was generated. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The date and time this report was generated. Set automatically.
